creator: inucat@proton.me
text:
Created attachment 251610
Diff of new port against origin/2024Q2

I ported a window manager of elementary OS for FreeBSD!
Tested on the FreeBSD installation in a virtual machine of QEMU/KVM on Manjaro Linux 6.9.

== Test environment

Architecture: x86_64
FreeBSD Version: 14.0-RELEASE-p6

== Side note

This is the first contribution for me.
Please inform me if I missed some defects or code of conduct.

Thanks.
